name: CRK - Red Velvet Cookie
description:
"Yeah, I guess it is... What about you?"

!!GingerBrave POV!!

GingerBrave really needs more attention and not hate like if you think about it GingerBrave is literally a child (or teen) and does not have ANY family like he had a younger brother but he was crumbled by the witch and the closest thing to family GingerBrave probably has is Strawberry Cookie and Wizard Cookie (or any other cookies in your au).

I actually do feel bad for GingerBrave 😢
